name: Orange-Jicama Salads
recipeInstructions:
Arrange oranges, avocados, and jicama (cut into julienne strips) on salad greens on 6 salad plates. Serve with Orange Dressing. 6 SERVINGS; 275 CALORIES PER SERVING.
Orange Dressing:
1/3 cup Vegetable oil
1 teaspoon Grated orange peel
1/4 cup Orange juice
2 tablespoons Sugar
2 tablespoons Lemon juice
1/2 teaspoon Dry mustard
1/4 teaspoon Salt
